description:
2023 BMW X6M Competition, 4.4 TC V8, AWD, 617bhp, 8 Speed Auto. AED 369,000 or AED 5,781 / Month with 20 % Down Payment over 5 Years. 
 - Mileage only 54,000 KM's - BMW Warranty Valid Until January 2028 or 200,000 KMs - BMW Service Contract Valid Until January 2028 or 100,000 KMs - Full Service History - GCC specification - Price includes VAT 
 - M Sport Exhaust System - 21"/22" Alloy Wheels - Comfort Access System - Soft Close Automatic System for Doors - M Compound Brake with Red Calipers - M Carbon Mirror Caps - BMW Individual Shadow line Lights - M Carbon Spoiler - Panorama Glass Roof Sky Lounge - Cup Holder Temperature-adjustable - Active Seat Ventilation, Front - Seat Adjustment Electric with Memory Function - M Seat Belts - M Multi-Function Seats - Interior Trim Finished in Carbon - Automatic Air Conditioning 4-zone Control - Ambient Air Package - Massage Function - Adaptive LED Headlights - Driving Assistant Professional - Parking Assistant Professional - Apple CarPlay - Bowers & Wilkins Diamond Surround Sound - Wireless Charging Tray - BMW Live Cockpit Professional - BMW Gesture Control - Individual Roof-lining Alcantara - BMW Individual High-gloss Shadow line Exterior Trim With Extended Features - M Drivers Package
